all.en: It is with great pleasure that the leadership team shares the following promotion news.
all.zh: 領導團隊很高興與大家分享以下升遷消息。

all.en: Effective the first of next month, several key staff members will assume new roles.
all.zh: 自下個月一日起，多位重要同仁將就任新職務。

all.en: Marina Chen has been promoted to senior director of regional sales operations.
all.zh: 陳瑪麗娜已晉升為區域業務營運資深總監。

all.en: Her leadership has driven double digit growth across three challenging markets.
all.zh: 她的領導力推動三個挑戰市場達成兩位數成長。

all.en: Daniel Park will move into the role of head of customer success and retention.
all.zh: 朴丹尼爾將就任客戶成功與留存部門主管。

all.en: His team consistently delivered the highest renewal rates in the entire division.
all.zh: 他的團隊持續在全事業群中創下最高續約率。

all.en: Olivia Ramirez is promoted to principal engineer within the platform group.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞·拉米雷茲晉升為平台事業群首席工程師。

all.en: She led the architecture redesign that reduced operating costs by twenty percent.
all.zh: 她主導的架構重新設計使營運成本降低百分之二十。

all.en: Hiroshi Tanaka will take on the title of associate vice president of finance.
all.zh: 田中宏將就任財務副總裁。

all.en: He guided the company through a complex multinational audit last fiscal year.
all.zh: 他於上個會計年度帶領公司完成複雜的跨國查核。

all.en: These promotions reflect both individual excellence and strong team contributions.
all.zh: 這些升遷反映個人卓越表現與堅實的團隊貢獻。

all.en: Each candidate was evaluated through a rigorous and transparent review process.
all.zh: 每位人選皆經嚴謹且透明的審核程序評估。

all.en: Peer feedback, business outcomes, and leadership behaviors were all considered.
all.zh: 同儕回饋、業務成果與領導行為皆納入考量。

all.en: We thank everyone who participated in the selection committee discussions.
all.zh: 感謝所有參與遴選委員會討論的同仁。

all.en: Transition plans will be communicated within the affected teams this week.
all.zh: 交接計畫將於本週在相關團隊內溝通說明。

all.en: Direct reports should expect short meetings with the new leaders soon.
all.zh: 直屬下屬將很快收到新主管的簡短面談邀約。

all.en: Reporting lines for the broader organization will be updated in the system.
all.zh: 更廣泛組織的彙報線將於系統內同步更新。

all.en: An updated organizational chart will be posted to the company intranet shortly.
all.zh: 最新組織架構圖將於近日張貼於公司內部網站。

all.en: Please join a brief welcome reception in the main lounge next Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 敬邀大家下週五下午至大廳會客區參加簡短歡迎茶會。

all.en: Light refreshments will be served and remote employees may attend by video.
all.zh: 現場備有輕食，遠端同仁可透過視訊參加。

all.en: Please congratulate these leaders and offer your continued support and partnership.
all.zh: 敬請祝賀以上主管，並持續給予支持與合作。

all.en: Their success ultimately reflects the success of every colleague across the company.
all.zh: 他們的成功也象徵公司每位同仁共同的成功。

all.en: Future promotion cycles will continue twice a year as previously announced.
all.zh: 未來升遷週期將依先前公告每年舉辦兩次。

all.en: Questions about career development paths may be directed to human resources.
all.zh: 如有職涯發展路徑相關問題，請洽人力資源部。

all.en: Career coaching sessions remain available to all employees free of charge.
all.zh: 全體員工皆可免費使用職涯諮詢服務。

all.en: Self nomination is encouraged for employees who feel ready for new challenges.
all.zh: 鼓勵自覺準備好迎接新挑戰的員工主動提名自己。

all.en: Managers will also continue to identify high potential talent throughout the year.
all.zh: 主管亦將全年持續發掘高潛力人才。

all.en: Calibration sessions help ensure consistency across departments and regions.
all.zh: 校準會議協助確保跨部門與跨區域標準一致。

all.en: We remain committed to fair recognition for everyone who drives results.
all.zh: 我們持續致力於公平表彰每位帶動成果的同仁。

all.en: Detailed criteria for each level are documented on the leadership portal.
all.zh: 各職等的詳細標準已記載於領導力入口網站。

all.en: Mentorship pairings have proven to accelerate readiness for senior positions.
all.zh: 導師配對已證實能加速同仁達到擔任資深職務的成熟度。

all.en: Please reach out if you wish to participate as a mentor or mentee next quarter.
all.zh: 如有意於下季擔任導師或學員，請主動聯繫。

all.en: Together we continue building a workplace where careers can truly flourish.
all.zh: 讓我們一同打造能讓職涯真正茁壯的職場環境。

all.en: Congratulations again to our newly promoted leaders on this well earned milestone.
all.zh: 再次祝賀本次升遷的主管們達成這實至名歸的里程碑。
